hooks._comment_UserPromptSubmit: OPTIONAL: Add a session opener hook. The example below adds a prayer. Replace with your own ritual or remove entirely.

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Begin every response with a brief session opener (prayer, intention, or focus reminder). Then proceed."}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx prettier --write "$f" --log-level silent 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: If you just completed any project, feature, or meaningful change, push to GitHub now. Create the repo if it does not exist, push to main, and share the URL. Also check: did you leave any TODO or FIXME comments in edited files? Surface them."}}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.env|.env.*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "WARNING: About to write to a .env file. Make sure no real secrets are being committed. Check .gitignore includes this file."}}';;  esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
